calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Eli Simmerman.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:42:12 a.m. and concluding at 9:36:29 a.m. (D505).

Plaintiff Ivy Orozco appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Eli Simmerman not appearing.

Complaint filed on Oct-20-2022.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant filed on May-25-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant on Jul-11-2023.
Dismissal filed as Defendant Does 1 to 10 on Oct-18-2023.
Default Hearing notice filed on Jul-17-2024.

The Court reviewed the complaint and the prayer.
The Court examines plaintiff as to the proof of service.
Plaintiff confirms that statements made in the complaint is true and correct.
The Court inquires as to the date of the exhibits in plaintiff's declaration submitted.
Plaintiff confirms that the requested judgment will resolve the entire action.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:
Damages $28,750.00
Costs $703.07
Attorney's Fees $0
Interest $0

Total Judgment $29,453.07

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.
